titles.title: I'm So Glad That The Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm so glad that the Lord Brought me out; I'm so glad that the Lord Brought me out. If it had not been for Jesus Oh where would I be I'm so glad that the Lord Brought me out.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've been happy since The Lord brought me out. I've been happy since The Lord brought me out. If it had not been for Jesus Oh where would I be I've been happy since The Lord brought me out.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've been shouting since The Lord brought me out. I've been shouting since The Lord brought me out. If it had not been for Jesus Oh where would I be I've been shouting since The Lord brought me out.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've been singing since The Lord brought me out. I've been singing since The Lord brought me out. If it had not been for Jesus Oh where would I be I've been singing since The Lord brought me out.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Aren't you glad that The Lord brought you out? Aren't you glad that The Lord brought you out? If it had not been for Jesus Oh where would I be Aren't you glad that The Lord brought you out?
